Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    YamlParser
    Parses YAML text into a POJO model.
    YamlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to YAML.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
    Class
    Description
    YamlConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in YamlSerializer and YamlParser.
    YamlParser
    Parses YAML text into a POJO model.
    YamlParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    YamlParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of YamlParser.
    YamlParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    YamlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to YAML.
    YamlSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    YamlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of YamlSerializer.
    YamlSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    YamlWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing YAML.
